description:
Replace pharmacy-partner placeholder language on `/privacy` once the partner is selected and BAA-signed in T-066. The disclosure must name the entity, its state(s) of licensure, and its relationship to Apoth (independent compounding pharmacy, not owned by or affiliated with Apoth Health LLC).

**Acceptance**
- `/privacy` names the pharmacy partner with no `TODO:` chip remaining.
- The relationship sentence matches the corporate-structure framing in CLAUDE.md.
title: Pharmacy partner disclosure
